description: This bag from fabindia references authentic Indian style with its materials and design details. Epitomise the ethnic boho chic look when you match this to Indian ensembles or pair it with a dress and heels for a great Indo-Western fusion.Dimensions : 18 cm x 16 cmRectangular silk covered upper with a flapMagnetic button closure with tassels hanging from the flapFabric innerZipper insideBeaded shoulder strapCareWipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust
